title: Cron Scheduler
description: A daemon loop watches durable cron definitions, queues due jobs, and lets the agent process them.

steps.content: Every weekday morning, remind me to review open tasks.
steps.annotation: The user asks for a recurring future action.

steps.content: I'll create a cron job and store it so the scheduler can pick it up later.
steps.annotation: The agent delegates recurrence to the scheduler instead of relying on current context.
The new tool validates and persists a cron definition.
The job is written to the durable schedule store.

steps.content: cron_scheduler_loop: cron_7 matched current minute -> cron_queue.put(cron_7)
steps.annotation: The independent scheduler daemon detects that the job is due.

steps.content: queue_processor_loop: dequeued cron_7 and invoked agent_loop(prompt)
steps.annotation: A separate processor turns due jobs into normal agent work.

steps.content: Scheduled. When the cron fires, the queue processor will run the reminder prompt through the agent loop.
steps.annotation: The final answer explains the durable recurring behavior.
